evaluation_summary.full_credit: valid candidate and reference pass and all five negatives killed behaviorally

modeling_constraints: Use portable Spectre-compatible Verilog-A and voltage contributions for public outputs.
Do not use branch-current oracles, hidden pass/fail ports, checker side channels, or testbench code in the DUT bundle.

properties.observable_contract: Reset or disabled operation drives vout, limit_metric, and regulation_ok low.
With adequate headroom and sub-limit demand, vout equals vref and regulation_ok is asserted.
When input headroom is insufficient, vout is clamped to max(vss, vin minus dropout).
Demand above demand_limit produces limit_metric equal to the overload and reduces vout by that overload subject to rails and dropout.
regulation_ok is high only for enabled, non-reset, non-limited operation with enough input headroom.

title: Current-limited Regulator Macro
